findings.message: Hand-authored core BPMN/PNML models are process-review abstractions; generated state-machine models are canonical transition exports.
Generated models expose each canonical state transition; core models collapse related administrative work into higher-level workflow activities.

intentional_abstractions: Core BPMN groups search, consultation, extension, and charge assessment as workflow activities.
Generated BPMN exposes state-to-state transitions from ALLOWED_TRANSITIONS.
Core PNML is a process-review net; generated PNML is a state-transition net.
Neither model is executable legal workflow or decision certification.
scope: Core workflow process models compared with generated canonical state-machine exports
